challenges.title: Print-Friendly Page
challenges.description: Create a webpage that looks good on screen but has dedicated print styles.
challenges.instructions: Add @media print rules to hide navigation, ads, and make text readable in print.
hints: Hide nav, sidebar, and ads with display: none
Remove background colors and set black text
challenges.solution: @media print { body { font-size: 12pt; color: black; background: white; } nav, .ad, .sidebar { display: none; } a { color: black; text-decoration: underline; } }

challenges.title: Dark Mode Toggle with Media Query Fallback
challenges.description: Create a page that supports system dark mode via prefers-color-scheme and also has a manual toggle.
challenges.instructions: Use prefers-color-scheme for automatic dark mode. Add a toggle button that overrides with a class.
hints: Define CSS variables for light and dark themes
Use a .dark class on body for manual override
challenges.solution: :root { --bg: white; --text: #333; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { :root { --bg: #1a1a2e; --text: #e0e0e0; } } body.dark { --bg: #1a1a2e; --text: #e0e0e0; } body { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); }

challenges.title: Adaptive Layout with Multiple Media Features
challenges.description: Build a layout that changes based on viewport width AND orientation AND hover capability.
challenges.instructions: Create a grid that is 1 column on portrait mobile, 2 on landscape mobile, 3 on tablet+ with hover effects.
hints: Combine orientation and min-width in media queries
Use hover: hover for hover effects, hover: none for touch sizing
challenges.solution: @media (orientation: portrait) { .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } @media (orientation: landscape) and (min-width: 480px) { .grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (min-width: 768px) { .grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } } @media (hover: hover) { .card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } } @media (hover: none) { .card { min-height: 48px; } }
